features.title: PolyU SSO Mock Login
features.description: Allows students to input Name, Student ID, and Group Name, generating a secure session linked to their group.

features.title: Gamified Character Assignment
features.description: A 4-question onboarding quiz mapping students to 4 fantasy roles (Magician, Knight, etc.) based on leadership traits.

features.title: Real-time Multi-user Chat
features.description: Enables 5-6 students in the same group to exchange text messages in real-time via Supabase WebSockets.

features.title: @Betty AI Tutor Integration
features.description: Intercepts messages containing '@Betty', triggering Gemini API to reply with specialized mentoring context.

features.title: Telemetry & Student Tracking Metrics
features.description: Tracks word count, message frequency, last active timestamp, and AI triggers per user ID into DB logs.

features.title: Teacher Analytics View
features.description: A secure portal displaying bar charts of participation, chat logs, and an automated AI summary of group alignment.

features.title: Audio Speech Evaluator
features.description: Records student audio presentation pitches and utilizes LLM evaluation for immediate individual feedback.
